title: Xbox abandons IO Interactive's Project Fantasy and the studio announces layoffs
summary: Xbox's withdrawal from the online RPG causes cuts at IO Interactive, although the studio asserts it remains committed to development.

title: Microsoft considers shutting down Arkane Studios and canceling Marvel's Blade
summary: Multiple reports indicate that Xbox is evaluating the closure of the studio and the cancellation of the Blade game as part of its restructuring.

title: The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered will arrive on Nintendo Switch 2 in August with a physical edition
summary: The remaster of the classic RPG will launch on August 11 and will include the full game on cartridge for Switch 2.

title: Splatoon Raiders emerges as Nintendo's promising standalone shooter
summary: The game receives its own Nintendo Direct detailing its cooperative mode, customization, and weapons, with positive reviews from the specialized press.

title: Valve clarifies the future of Steam Machine amid criticism and supply problems
summary: The company confirms that Steam Machine benefits from the work on Steam Deck, but faces criticism over cancellation of accessories and component shortages.

title: Xbox could close Undead Labs, the developer of State of Decay
summary: The studio behind the State of Decay series would be at risk of closure or sale according to sources close to Xbox's restructuring.

title: Baldur's Gate developers refuse to make a fourth installment, considering it 'madness' to follow BG3
summary: Former project leaders decline Hasbro's offer, arguing that replicating the success of Baldur's Gate 3 would be impossible and would require years of work.

title: GTA 6 developers pressure Rockstar to recognize their union before launch
summary: Rockstar workers seek union recognition and give a 10-day ultimatum to avoid it or they will resort to a labor tribunal.

title: Guns of Eschaton, the last game from Half-Life 2's art director, is a western soulslike
summary: The western-themed FPS, posthumous work of Viktor Antonov, will launch on PC and consoles soon.

title: Netflix develops a live-action series based on Persona
summary: The popular Japanese RPG franchise will have a live-action adaptation produced by Sega for the streaming platform.

title: Xbox faces a wave of layoffs and union criticism over job uncertainty
summary: Microsoft cuts contracts and unions denounce the lack of protection for workers, amid the company's worst month in 26 years.

title: Turok: Origins reveals its gameplay in a new trailer
summary: Saber Interactive shows the game's gameplay, which is scheduled for release in fall 2026.

title: GTA 6 dominates sales charts and sparks debate over its possible $80 price
summary: Grand Theft Auto 6 tops worldwide pre-orders while analysts discuss the normalization of $80 and users seek to obtain it for free.

title: The 'Stop Killing Games' bill fails in California by three votes
summary: The initiative to mandate the maintenance of online games fails to pass, while the ESA declares community servers for Minecraft and Call of Duty illegal.

title: Developers reject generative artificial intelligence in video game development
summary: The Dragon Age writer calls AI a 'virulent plague' and the Godot engine bans AI-generated contributions due to lack of reliability.

title: Nintendo could update the LCD screen of Switch 2
summary: Rumors indicate that the company plans to release a revision of the LCD panel to improve the console's image quality.

title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 will not be on Xbox Game Pass this year
summary: Activision confirms that the new Call of Duty will not come to the subscription service, and ads highlight it controversially.

title: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 releases trailer and fans look for clues in Cyberpunk 2077
summary: Netflix launches the trailer for the second season of the anime, and a fan discovers scenes from it inside the video game.

title: Resident Evil creators imagine a peaceful retirement for Leon Kennedy
summary: The series director and Hideki Kamiya suggest a relaxed game where Leon retires fishing, similar to Stardew Valley.

title: Super Mario Galaxy Movie arrives on streaming with confirmed date
summary: The animated Super Mario Galaxy movie will be available on digital platforms in July 2026.
